unit_test.title: Unit 7 Cycle Assessment & Basic Skills Test

questions.question: 在句型 'How can I get to the Fuxi Museum?' 中，get to 意为‘到达’。
questions.explanation: get to 是固定短语，表示到达某地。

questions.question: 'pilot' 的意思是‘科学家’。
questions.explanation: pilot 意为飞行员，科学家是 scientist。

questions.question: 寓言故事中的 'Setting' 通常指的是故事中的角色。
questions.explanation: Setting 指的是背景或环境，Characters 指的是角色。

questions.question: 在句子 'Check it out' 中，Check 和 it 之间通常会发生连读。
questions.explanation: 辅音k和元音i相连，通常需要连读。

questions.question: ‘Worried’ 的意思是‘生气的’。
questions.explanation: Worried 是担心的，生气的应该是 angry。

questions.question: How ______ you feel today?
questions.explanation: 询问感觉用助动词do配合动词原形feel。

questions.question: You should ______ a deep breath and count to ten.
questions.explanation: should是情态动词，后面接动词原形。

questions.question: If you want to go to the park, you can go ______ bus.
questions.explanation: by + 交通工具表示出行方式。

questions.question: Where is the post office? It's ______ the hospital.
questions.explanation: next to 表示在...旁边，是常见的方位表达。

questions.question: The Robin Hood story tells us we should ______.
questions.explanation: 罗宾汉的故事寓意是帮助他人。

questions.question: What is your father's job? He is a ______.
questions.explanation: 由job引导的问题应回答职业名称。

questions.question: What ______ you going to do this weekend?
questions.explanation: 主语是you，be动词用are。

questions.question: He likes ______ stories and singing.
questions.explanation: like doing sth. 表示长期稳定的爱好。

questions.question: Your dog is ill. You are very ______.
questions.explanation: 宠物生病了通常会感到难过。

questions.question: Which sentence has a natural pause (V)?
options: Wait V for the V green light.
I want V to go V to the cinema.
First, V go to the bookstore.
Turn V left V at the V light.
questions.answer: First, V go to the bookstore.
questions.explanation: 句子开头的连接词（如First）后通常有自然停顿。

questions.question: How ______ you today? I am fine.
questions.explanation: 主语you配合be动词are进行提问。

questions.question: Don't go at a ______ light.
questions.explanation: 红灯停，不能走。

questions.question: My uncle works on a boat. He is a ______.
questions.explanation: 在船上工作的人是渔民。

questions.question: I like swimming and doing ______.
questions.explanation: 练武术的固定表达是do kung fu。

questions.question: 请将单词与其对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: coach-教练, pilot-飞行员, factory worker-工厂工人, writer-作家。

questions.question: 请将情绪词汇与其对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: scared-害怕, angry-生气, worried-担心, excited-兴奋。

questions.question: 请将下列单词连成一句话：
questions.explanation: 祈使句以动词原形开头，表示在灯前等待。

questions.question: 请将下列单词连成一句话：
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句语序：特殊疑问词 + be + 主语 + doing。

exam.title: Grade 6 Autumn Term Final Comprehensive Exam

questions.question: You can send a letter in the cinema.
questions.explanation: 寄信要去邮局(post office)而不是电影院。

questions.question: In the story 'The Ant and the Grasshopper', the ant is very hardworking.
questions.explanation: 蚂蚁和蚱蜢的故事中，蚂蚁以勤劳(hardworking)著称。

questions.question: He likes go hiking on weekends.
questions.explanation: like后面接动词ing形式，应为going。

questions.question: 'I am going to visit my teacher' 描述的是将来发生的事。
questions.explanation: be going to 表示计划、打算做某事。

questions.question: The moral of a story is the same as the setting.
questions.explanation: moral指故事寓意，setting指背景，两者不同。

questions.question: ______ do you go to school? By bike.
questions.explanation: 回答是方式，疑问词用How。

questions.question: Turn left ______ the bookstore. Then go straight.
questions.explanation: 在某个具体的地点转弯用at。

questions.question: We are going to have a party ______.
questions.explanation: are going to 配合将来时间，this evening符合。

questions.question: Where is the li-nk-up (连读) in 'Stand up'?
questions.explanation: Stand结尾音/d/与up开头音/ʌ/连读。

questions.question: The ______ are the people or animals in a story.
questions.explanation: 故事中的人物或动物被称为角色。

questions.question: A postman works in a ______.
questions.explanation: 邮递员在邮局工作。

questions.question: If you are not happy, you might feel ______.
questions.explanation: 不开心即难过。

questions.question: My father ______ to work by subway.
questions.explanation: 主语my father是第三人称单数，动词加es。

questions.question: Someone is ill. You should say: ______.
questions.explanation: 生病时的建议是看医生。

questions.question: When you write a letter to a friend, you sign your name at the ______.
questions.explanation: 署名通常在信的底部。

questions.question: ______ is the cinema? It's near the park.
questions.explanation: 询问地点的疑问词。

questions.question: My sister likes ______ (collect) stamps.
questions.explanation: like后接doing表达兴趣爱好。

questions.question: Please ______ your warm clothes when it's cold.
questions.explanation: 穿衣服的动词是wear。

questions.question: The end of a story is part of the ______.
questions.explanation: 故事的结尾属于情节(plot)的一部分。

questions.question: 匹配动作短语与其含义。
questions.explanation: A-左转, B-乘车, C-生气, D-远足。

questions.question: 匹配故事分析相关词汇。
questions.explanation: A-背景, B-角色, C-情节, D-寓意。

questions.question: 请将下列单词连成一句话：
questions.explanation: 频度副词放在实义动词前。

questions.question: 请将下列单词连成一句话：
questions.explanation: 询问职业的标准句型：What does + 主语 + do?

knowledge_summary.point: 寓言故事要素分析 (Story Elements)
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 理解故事的三大支柱：Setting(背景/环境), Characters(角色), Plot(情节/起因经过结果), 以及最终的 Moral(寓意/道理)。
common_mistakes: 混淆 setting 和 plot，将发生的事件归为背景
无法用简单的英语正确概括故事的 moral
knowledge_summary.tips: 阅读故事时，先圈出人物，再划出时间地点，最后概括作者想通过故事教给我们什么。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 英语句子中当前一个单词以辅音结尾，后一个单词以元音开头时，需要自然连读；在意思停顿处通过感叹号、逗号进行停顿。
common_mistakes: 逐词念读，导致句子听起来生硬（Robot-style speech）
在不需要连读的地方强行连读
knowledge_summary.tips: 多做朗读练习，想象句子是一条流动的河，音强弱交替，不要在每个词后都断开。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 复习本册核心功能句：问路(Where is.../How can I get to...)、职业(What does...do?)、爱好(What are...hobbies?)和情绪(How do you feel?)。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Plan: be going to + V | Hobby: like + doing | Emotion: be + adj. | Direction: Turn left/right
common_mistakes: 忘记 like 后面的动词要变 ing 形式
第三人称单数主语后的动词漏掉 s/es
be going to 结构中丢掉 be 动词
knowledge_summary.tips: 通过‘思维导图’将各单元的核心词汇和句型串联起来，进行整体复习。
